ddt:Target.Name: PEB_5AGen2_v4.7
ddt:Target.Description:
18/04/2013 => Auto detection pour SW VC6.02
11/01/2013 => Mise a disposition de la Base PEB 5AGEN2 pour le projet Vehicule X38.
10/05/2012 => Officialisation date updated
11/04/2012 Correction error due to a bad coding on the request 310100 310100 22F18E etc..
13/03/2012 Modification DID 3038 due to problem of snapshot display. DID $303E, $303F and $3040 added.
15/12/2011: - Adding DTC 1052 - Delete DTC 1051
27/07/2011 - Modifying Vdiag from $04 to $05 - Adding DTCs 105052 and 10511E - Modifying the screen identification SW and HW - Adding screen associated to VERLOG and charge. - Modifying the item auto identification.
19/05/2011 Added screen for identification HW/SW (applicable for C-Loop)
24/03/2011 Modifying failure tupe of 1044 Adding DTCs 104864 and 104903 Added DIDs 3038, 3039, 303A, 303B
14/02/2011 Added DTCs 1046 and 1047 Factor of conversion modified from the DID 3013 Added the reference software for autoidentification
17/12/10 First base diagnosis for PEB GEN2 X10 based on the PEB GEN1 v5.5 diagnosis basis + DTCs D00587 and 104594

Data.Name: DistanceTotalizer
Data.Comment: Vehicle distance totalizer from EVC

Data.Name: BatteryVoltage
Data.Comment: USM battery voltage measure (for Diagnostic)

Data.Name: Batt_voltage_mes
Data.Comment: Battery voltage feed on KL30 measured by PEB

Data.Name: APCStatus
Data.Comment: APC feedback status from EVC (for diagnostic)

Data.Name: Volt_APCPEB_veh_status
Data.Comment: APC wire status from USM to PEB

Data.Name: Onboard Power Supply
Data.Comment: Internal supply

Data.Name: DCHighVoltage
Data.Comment: Voltage value of the HV Network

Data.Name: DCDCState
Data.Comment: DCDC state (Direct/Standby/Power Down)

Data.Name: DCDCActivation
Data.Comment: On/Off request of the DCDC from EVC

Data.Name: DCDCVoltageRegulation
Data.Comment: Voltage demand for the DCDC converter from the EVC

Data.Name: DCDCLowVoltage
Data.Comment: Voltage value of the LV Network by the DCDC converter

Data.Name: DCDCCurrentOutput
Data.Comment: Current value on the LV Network for the DCDC Converter

Data.Name: DCDCCurrentInput
Data.Comment: Current value on the HV Network for the DCDC Converter only

Data.Name: DCDCTemp
Data.Comment: Combination of all the DCDC converter sensors, so in %

Data.Name: DCDCDefault
Data.Comment: Failure class of the DCDC converter (A, B, C & D)

Data.Name: PEBDCDCServLampRequest
Data.Comment: service lamp alert request , following DCDC barrier security loose

Data.Name: InverterActivation
Data.Comment: On/Off power train activation request from EVC

Data.Name: PowerTrainCurrent
Data.Comment: Combinated current value on the HV Network of Inverter and Excitation

Data.Name: Current Ph U
Data.Comment: HV side phase U current measure

Data.Name: Current Ph V
Data.Comment: HV side phase V current measure

Data.Name: Current Ph W
Data.Comment: HV side phase W current measure

Data.Name: Current Excit Pos
Data.Comment: HV side Excitation + current measure

Data.Name: Current Excit Neg
Data.Comment: HV side Excitation - current measure

Data.Name: ElecTorqueRequest
Data.Comment: Torque demand for the power train from the EVC

Data.Name: PEBTorque
Data.Comment: Calculated torque by PEB for EVC

Data.Name: ElecMachineMaxMotorTorque
Data.Comment: Maximal available calculated torque in motor mode

Data.Name: ElecMachineMaxGenTorque
Data.Comment: Maximal available calculated torque in generator mode

Data.Name: ElecMachineSpeed
Data.Comment: machine speed

Data.Name: InverterTemp
Data.Comment: Combination of inverter and Excitation temperatures, so in %

Data.Name: ElecMachineTemp
Data.Comment: Indicatuer température machine

Data.Name: InverterTempOrder
Data.Comment: Real Inverter temperature in °C

Data.Name: Excitation temperature
Data.Comment: Real Excitation temperature in °C

Data.Name: Stator temperature
Data.Comment: Real stator temperature value in °C

Data.Name: Rotor temperature
Data.Comment: Calculated rotor temperature in °C

Data.Name: B_PebDischarge_sch_req
Data.Comment: Active discharge request from EVC to PEB

Data.Name: PEBActiveDischarge
Data.Comment: Effective active discharge feedback to EVC

Data.Name: ElecMAchineWorkingMode
Data.Comment: Mode of the power train (motor or generator)

Data.Name: ElecMachineDefault
Data.Comment: Failure class of the power train (A, B, C & D)

Data.Name: PEBMotorServLampRequest
Data.Comment: service lamp alert request , following power train barrier security loose

Data.Name: PEBMotorStopLampRequest
Data.Comment: stop lamp alert request , following power train barrier security loose

Data.Name: Rotor PositionSensor Supply
Data.Comment: Rotor position sensor supply

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
PEB Failure Class B with safety alert
OV flags Data Received by CAN
INV phase W internal current sensor
INV phase V internal current sensor
INV phase U internal current sensor
DCDC Sigma delta voltage sensor 14V side
DCDC internal Driver Board Temp sensor
DCDC internal Power module Temp sensor
PEB HV DC link discharge failure
Internal voltage sensor on HV side

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: RoutineEntryOption
Data.Comment: = "Routine" input parameters

Data.Name: VerlogStatus
Data.Comment: status verlog from PEB to EVC (locked or not)

Data.Name: Error angle
Data.Comment: Offset position hexadecimal code

Data.Name: PEBExcitationInterlockState
Data.Comment: Interlock for excitation

Data.Name: InterlockBatt
Data.Comment: Interlock plug service status, from LBC (condition for reprogramming)

Data.Name: PEBSpiderBoxInterlockState
Data.Comment: Interlock for spider Box

Data.Name: Interlock EM
Data.Comment: Interlock for EMR

Data.Name: Immobilizer - diagnosis availability
Data.Comment: Verrou logiciel - Disponibilité du diagnostic

Data.Name: Immobilizer - Byte 1 used to allow diagnosis
Data.Comment: Verrou logiciel - Octet de diagnostic 1

Data.Name: Immobilizer - Byte 2 used to allow diagnosis
Data.Comment: Verrou logiciel - Octet de diagnostic 2

Data.Name: Immobilizer - Byte 3 used to allow diagnosis
Data.Comment: Verrou logiciel - Octet de diagnostic 3

Data.Name: Immobilizer - engine not running due to ECM
Data.Comment: Verrou logiciel - moteur non tournant à cause de l'ECM

Data.Name: Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM in secure mode
Data.Comment: Verrou logiciel - moteur non tournant à cause de la BCM en mode sécurisé

Data.Name: Immobilizer - engine not running due to no BCM authorization
Data.Comment: Verrou logiciel - moteur non tournant à cause de la non autorisation BCM

Data.Name: Immobilizer - engine not running due to a CAN network problem with the BCM
Data.Comment: Verrou logiciel - moteur non tournant à cause d'un problème CAN avec la BCM

Data.Name: DiagnosticIdentificationCode
Data.Comment: Diag evolution number

Data.Name: EditionNumber
Data.Comment: Software version(edition) number

Data.Name: SoftwareNumber
Data.Comment: Software identification number

Data.Name: SupplierNumber.ITG
Data.Comment: Supplier ITG code

Data.Name: Vin In Ascii
Data.Comment: VIN readen in generic frame $2181

Data.Name: PaddingDatas
Data.Comment: Spaces in Ascii, added to complete the frame request $2184, tracability

Data.Name: Siemens serial number Byte 0 (to be coded in ASCII)
Data.Comment: To be readen by request $2184, tracability

Data.Name: Siemens serial number Byte 1 (to be coded in ASCII)
Data.Comment: To be readen by request $2184, tracability

Data.Name: Siemens serial number Byte 10 (to be coded in ASCII)
Data.Comment: To be readen by request $2184, tracability

Data.Name: Siemens serial number Byte 11 (to be coded in ASCII)
Data.Comment: To be readen by request $2184, tracability

Data.Name: Siemens serial number Byte 12 (to be coded in ASCII)
Data.Comment: To be readen by request $2184, tracability

Data.Name: Siemens serial number Byte 13 (to be coded in ASCII)
Data.Comment: To be readen by request $2184, tracability

Data.Name: Siemens serial number Byte 14 (to be coded in ASCII)
Data.Comment: To be readen by request $2184, tracability

Data.Name: Siemens serial number Byte 15 (to be coded in ASCII)
Data.Comment: To be readen by request $2184, tracability

Data.Name: Siemens serial number Byte 2 (to be coded in ASCII)
Data.Comment: To be readen by request $2184, tracability

Data.Name: Siemens serial number Byte 3 (to be coded in ASCII)
Data.Comment: To be readen by request $2184, tracability

Data.Name: Siemens serial number Byte 4 (to be coded in ASCII)
Data.Comment: To be readen by request $2184, tracability

Data.Name: Siemens serial number Byte 5 (to be coded in ASCII)
Data.Comment: To be readen by request $2184, tracability

Data.Name: Siemens serial number Byte 6 (to be coded in ASCII)
Data.Comment: To be readen by request $2184, tracability

Data.Name: Siemens serial number Byte 7 (to be coded in ASCII)
Data.Comment: To be readen by request $2184, tracability

Data.Name: Siemens serial number Byte 8 (to be coded in ASCII)
Data.Comment: To be readen by request $2184, tracability

Data.Name: Siemens serial number Byte 9 (to be coded in ASCII)
Data.Comment: To be readen by request $2184, tracability

Data.Name: Configuration of Electrical Vehicle Networks
Data.Comment: Configuration of Electrical Vehicle Networks

Data.Name: List of Electrical Vehicle ECUs with After-sales diagnostic
Data.Comment: List of Electrical Vehicle ECUs with After-sales diagnostic

Data.Name: R20 Rotor resistor value
Data.Comment: Electrical machine rotor temperature correction code

Data.Name: Charge request from EVC
Data.Comment: Charge request from EVC

Data.Name: Effective Charge feedback to EVC
Data.Comment: Effective Charge feedback to EVC

Data.Name: Distribution type from JB
Data.Comment: Distribution type from JB to PEB

Data.Name: REF SUPPLIER
Data.Comment: To be readen by request $2184, tracability

Data.Name: REFHW (to be coded on 10 bytes)
Data.Comment: To be readen by request $2184, tracability

Data.Name: DATE(YEAR + Day Number)
Data.Comment: To be readen by request $2184, tracability

Data.Name: CPLD DCDC
Data.Comment: CPLD DCDC

Data.Name: CPLD INVERTER
Data.Comment: CPLD INVERTER

Data.Name: Failure class of the charge
Data.Comment: Failure class of the charge (A, B, C & D)

Item.Text: No possible classification about the type of fault
Open circuit or Short circuit to ground
Open circuit or Short circuit to battery

Data.Name: Raw debug data encoding the cause of SPT fail
Data.Comment: Raw debug data encoding the cause of SPT fail

Data.Name: ID of last detected FAM raising the DTC
Data.Comment: ID of last detected FAM raising the DTC

Data.Name: ID of first detected FAM raising the DTC
Data.Comment: ID of first detected FAM raising the DTC

Data.Name: Charge request from EVC to PEB
Data.Comment: Charge request from EVC to PEB

Request.Name: DataRead.DistanceTotalizer
Request.Comment: Request $22 - Vehicle distance totalizer from EVC

Request.Name: DataRead.BatteryVoltage
Request.Comment: Request $22 - USM battery voltage measure (for Diagnostic)

Request.Name: DataRead.Batt_voltage_mes
Request.Comment: Request $22 - Battery voltage feed on KL30 measured by PEB

Request.Name: DataRead.APCStatus
Request.Comment: Request $22 - APC feedback status from EVC (for diagnostic)

Request.Name: DataRead.Volt_APCPEB_veh_status
Request.Comment: Request $22 - APC wire status from USM to PEB

Request.Name: DataRead.Onboard Power Supply
Request.Comment: Request $22 - Internal supply

Request.Name: DataRead.DCHighVoltage
Request.Comment: Request $22 - Voltage value of the HV Network

Request.Name: DataRead.DCDCState
Request.Comment: Request $22 - DCDC state (Direct/Standby/Power Down)

Request.Name: DataRead.DCDCActivation
Request.Comment: Request $22 - On/Off request of the DCDC from EVC

Request.Name: DataRead.DCDCVoltageRegulation
Request.Comment: Request $22 - Voltage demand for the DCDC converter from the EVC

Request.Name: DataRead.DCDCLowVoltage
Request.Comment: Request $22 - Voltage value of the LV Network by the DCDC converter

Request.Name: DataRead.DCDCCurrentOutput
Request.Comment: Request $22 - Current value on the LV Network for the DCDC Converter

Request.Name: DataRead.DCDCCurrentInput
Request.Comment: Request $22 - Current value on the HV Network for the DCDC Converter only

Request.Name: DataRead.DCDCTemp
Request.Comment: Request $22 - Combination of all the DCDC converter sensors, so in %

Request.Name: DataRead.DCDCDefault
Request.Comment: Request $22 - Failure class of the DCDC converter (A, B, C & D)

Request.Name: DataRead.PEBDCDCServLampRequest
Request.Comment: Request $22 - service lamp alert request , following DCDC barrier security loose

Request.Name: DataRead.InverterActivation
Request.Comment: Request $22 - On/Off power train activation request from EVC

Request.Name: DataRead.PowerTrainCurrent
Request.Comment: Request $22 - Combinated current value on the HV Network of Inverter and Excitation

Request.Name: DataRead.Current Ph U
Request.Comment: Request $22 - HV side phase U current measure

Request.Name: DataRead.Current Ph V
Request.Comment: Request $22 - HV side phase V current measure

Request.Name: DataRead.Current Ph W
Request.Comment: Request $22 - HV side phase W current measure

Request.Name: DataRead.Current Excit Pos
Request.Comment: Request $22 - HV side Excitation + current measure

Request.Name: DataRead.Current Excit Neg
Request.Comment: Request $22 - HV side Excitation - current measure

Request.Name: DataRead.ElecTorqueRequest
Request.Comment: Request $22 - Torque demand for the power train from the EVC

Request.Name: DataRead.PEBTorque
Request.Comment: Request $22 - Calculated torque by PEB for EVC

Request.Name: DataRead.ElecMachineMaxMotorTorque
Request.Comment: Request $22 - Maximal available calculated torque in motor mode

Request.Name: DataRead.ElecMachineMaxGenTorque
Request.Comment: Request $22 - Maximal available calculated torque in generator mode

Request.Name: DataRead.ElecMachineSpeed
Request.Comment: Request $22 - machine speed

Request.Name: DataRead.InverterTemp
Request.Comment: Request $22 - Combination of inverter and Excitation temperatures, so in %

Request.Name: DataRead.ElecMachineTemp
Request.Comment: Request $22 - Combination of rotor and stator temperatures, so in %

Request.Name: DataRead.InverterTempOrder
Request.Comment: Request $22 - Real Inverter temperature in °C

Request.Name: DataRead.Excitation temperature
Request.Comment: Request $22 - Real Excitation temperature in °C

Request.Name: DataRead.Stator temperature
Request.Comment: Request $22 - Real stator temperature value in °C

Request.Name: DataRead.Rotor temperature
Request.Comment: Request $22 - Calculated rotor temperature in °C

Request.Name: DataRead.B_PebDischarge_sch_req
Request.Comment: Request $22 - Active discharge request from EVC to PEB

Request.Name: DataRead.PEBActiveDischarge
Request.Comment: Request $22 - Effective active discharge feedback to EVC

Request.Name: DataRead.ElecMAchineWorkingMode
Request.Comment: Request $22 - Mode of the power train (motor or generator)

Request.Name: DataRead.ElecMachineDefault
Request.Comment: Request $22 - Failure class of the power train (A, B, C & D)

Request.Name: DataRead.PEBMotorServLampRequest
Request.Comment: Request $22 - service lamp alert request , following power train barrier security loose

Request.Name: DataRead.PEBMotorStopLampRequest
Request.Comment: Request $22 - stop lamp alert request , following power train barrier security loose

Request.Name: DataRead.Rotor PositionSensor Supply
Request.Comment: Request $22 - Rotor position sensor supply

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: DataRead.bootSoftwareIdentification
Request.Comment: Service 22 request begin by DataRead.

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.AgingCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enable P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl, ...)

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.ExtendedDiagnostic
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Default
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Programming
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: DataRead.VerlogStatus
Request.Comment: Requête $22 - status verlog from PEB to EVC (locked or not)

Request.Name: DataRead.Error angle
Request.Comment: Requête $22 - Offset position value

Request.Name: DataWrite.Error angle
Request.Comment: Request $2E - Offset position value

Request.Name: DataRead.PEBExcitationInterlockState
Request.Comment: Requête $22 - Interlock for excitation

Request.Name: DataRead.InterlockBatt
Request.Comment: Requête $22 - Interlock plug service status, from LBC (condition for reprogramming)

Request.Name: DataRead.Immobilizer - diagnosis availability
Request.Comment: Requête $22 - Verrou logiciel - Disponibilité du diagnostic

Request.Comment: Requête $22 - Verrou logiciel - Octet de diagnostic 3

DataItem.Name: Immobilizer - Byte 3 used to allow diagnosis

Request.Comment: Requête $22 - Verrou logiciel - moteur non tournant à cause de l'ECM

DataItem.Name: Immobilizer - engine not running due to ECM

Request.Comment: Requête $22 - Verrou logiciel - moteur non tournant à cause de la BCM en mode sécurisé

DataItem.Name: Immobilizer - engine not running due to a CAN network problem with the BCM

Request.Name: Configuration of Electrical Vehicle Networks
Request.Comment: Service de lecture de la configuration du réseau CAN

Request.Name: List of Electrical Vehicle ECUs with After-sales diagnostic

DataItem.Name: List of Electrical Vehicle ECUs with After-sales diagnostic

Request.Name: DataRead.R20 Rotor resistor value
Request.Comment: Request $22 - R20 Rotor resistor value

Request.Name: DataWrite.R20 Rotor resistor value
Request.Comment: Request $2E - R20 Rotor resistor value

Request.Name: SynchronousResolver_Learning-status
Request.Comment: Request Learning position sensor

Request.Name: SynchronousResolver_Learning-start
Request.Comment: Request Learning position sensor

Request.Name: DataRead.Effective Charge feedback to EVC
Request.Comment: Request $22 - Effective Charge feedback to EVC

Request.Name: DataRead.Distribution type from JB
Request.Comment: Request $22 - Distribution type from JB to PEB

Request.Name: DataRead.CPLD DCDC
Request.Comment: Request $22 - CPLD DCDC Version

Request.Name: DataRead.CPLD INVERTER
Request.Comment: Request $22 - CPLD Inverter Version

Request.Name: DataRead.Failure class of the charge
Request.Comment: Request $22 - Failure class of the power train

Request.Name: DataRead.Raw debug data encoding the cause of SPT fail
Request.Comment: Read Raw debug data encoding the cause of SPT fail

DataItem.Name: Raw debug data encoding the cause of SPT fail

Request.Name: DataRead.ID of last detected FAM raising the DTC
Request.Comment: Read ID of last detected FAM raising the DTC

DataItem.Name: ID of last detected FAM raising the DTC

Request.Name: DataRead.ID of first detected FAM raising the DTC
Request.Comment: Read ID of first detected FAM raising the DTC

DataItem.Name: ID of first detected FAM raising the DTC

Request.Name: DataRead.Charge request from EVC to PEB
Request.Comment: Read Charge request from EVC to PEB

DataItem.Name: Charge request from EVC to PEB

Device.Name: PEB Ctrl Board
Device.Mnemonic: Faulty HW detection, Faulty ROM , Faulty RAM , Faulty EEPROM

Device.Name: Internal voltage sensor on HV side
Device.Mnemonic: Faulty voltage sensor HV side, Drift of voltage sensor HV side

Device.Name: PEB HV DC link discharge failure
DCDC internal Power module Temp sensor
Device.Mnemonic: Faulty DCDC Power Module Temp sensor , or drift of sensor

Device.Name: DCDC internal Driver Board Temp sensor
Device.Mnemonic: Faulty DCDC Driver Board Temp sensor, or drift of sensor

Test.Description: Not to be used in after sales

Device.Name: DCDC current sensor LV side
Device.Mnemonic: Faulty DCDC Current sensor LV side

Device.Name: DCDC Sigma delta voltage sensor 14V side
Device.Mnemonic: Faulty DCDC Sigma delta sensor 14V side

Device.Name: 14V_DCDC wire
Device.Mnemonic: 14VNET_P signal Open Circuit, 14VNET_P signal amplitude out of range: below Min (Under), 14VNET_P signal amplitude out of range: above Max (Over), DCDC 14V Short circuit

Device.Name: HV_DCDC wire
Device.Mnemonic: DCDC HV Under voltage, DCDC HV Over voltage

Device.Name: INV internal temp sensor
Device.Mnemonic: Faulty INV Temp sensor or Drift

Device.Name: INV phase U internal current sensor
Device.Mnemonic: Faulty phase U current sensor or Drift

Device.Name: INV phase V internal current sensor
Device.Mnemonic: Faulty phase V current sensor or Drift

Device.Name: INV phase W internal current sensor
Device.Mnemonic: Faulty phase W current sensor or Drift

Device.Name: HV_Inverter wire
Device.Mnemonic: INV+EXCIT HV Under voltage, INV+EXCIT HV Over voltage

Device.Name: INV_EM Iphase
Device.Mnemonic: EM I phase overcurrent, EM phase current sum different from 0, EM I phase short circuit or IGBT failure

Device.Name: EXCIT Temp sensor
Device.Mnemonic: Faulty Excit Temp sensor or drift

Device.Name: EM Iexcit signal
Device.Mnemonic: EM Iexcit signal overcurrent, circuit open, short circuit or IGBT failure

Device.Name: APC by wire
Device.Mnemonic: Plausibility with Verlog or APC by CAN

Device.Name: EM_SIN signal
Device.Mnemonic: EM_SIN signal amplitude out of range (below Min, above max) or faulty signal

Device.Name: EM_COS signal
Device.Mnemonic: EM_COS signal amplitude out of range (below Min, above max) or faulty signal

Device.Name: EM_SIN_COS signals
Device.Mnemonic: EM_SIN_COS signal square sum out of range

Device.Name: EM_TEMP signal
Device.Mnemonic: Faulty EM_TEMP signal :amplitude out of range (below Min or above Max) or drift sensor

Device.Name: EMR Interlock electrical circuit
Device.Mnemonic: EMR interlock open or short circuit to ground, short circuit to Vbat

Device.Name: Spiderbox Interlock electrical circuit
Device.Mnemonic: Spiderbox Interlock open or short to ground, short circuit to Vbat

Device.Name: Excitation Interlock electrical circuit
Device.Mnemonic: Excitation Interlock pen or short to ground, short circuit to Vbat

Device.Name: DCDC Trafo temp sensor
Device.Mnemonic: Faulty DCDC Trafo Temp sensor or drift

Test.Description: Not to be used in after sales

Device.Name: DCDC voltage sensors 14V side
Device.Mnemonic: Drift between DCDC ADC sensor 14V side and Sigma delta sensor

Device.Name: Writing of rotor resistance
Device.Mnemonic: Rotor winding resistance writing not done

Device.Name: OV flags Data Received by CAN
Device.Mnemonic: Over Voltage flag receivedr fom LBC

Device.Name: CAN communication
Device.Mnemonic: CAN Control bus module: bus off

Device.Name: Communication with EVC
Device.Mnemonic: Lost communication with EVC, HV data invalid from EVC

Device.Name: Communication in charge mode
Device.Mnemonic: Lost communication with EVC in charge (R-03) or with JB

Device.Name: Wrong direction of the wheels
Device.Mnemonic: Wrong direction of the wheels during autocalibration routine

Device.Name: PEB Failure Class B with safety alert
Device.Mnemonic: PEB Failure Class B with safety alert

Label.Text: Serial Number (Ref SUPPLIER) applicable in PS (D1 sample to DXXX)

Display.DataName: Immobilizer - Byte 1 used to allow diagnosis
Display.RequestName: DataRead.Immobilizer - Byte 1 used to allow diagnosis

Display.DataName: Immobilizer - Byte 2 used to allow diagnosis
Display.RequestName: DataRead.Immobilizer - Byte 2 used to allow diagnosis

Display.DataName: Immobilizer - Byte 3 used to allow diagnosis
Display.RequestName: DataRead.Immobilizer - Byte 3 used to allow diagnosis

Display.DataName: Immobilizer - engine not running due to ECM
Display.RequestName: DataRead.Immobilizer - engine not running due to ECM

Display.DataName: Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM in secure mode
Display.RequestName: DataRead.Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM in secure mode

Display.DataName: Immobilizer - engine not running due to no BCM authorization
Display.RequestName: DataRead.Immobilizer - engine not running due to no BCM authorization

Display.DataName: Immobilizer - engine not running due to a CAN network problem with the BCM
Display.RequestName: DataRead.Immobilizer - engine not running due to a CAN network problem with the BCM

Label.Text: CAUTION : Reset 12V to take into account this value
Write a new Rotor Resistance code :
This value shall be written with 6 characters in hexadecimal
Read the new Rotor Resistance code :
Read the new Zero Angle code :
Write a new Zero Angle code :
This value shall be written with 6 characters in hexadecimal
CAUTION : Reset 12V to take into account this value
CAUTION : Reset 12V to take into account this value
Read status of the learning position sensor

Button.Text: Launching of the learning position sensor
Status of the learning position sensor
